tasks.title: Watch SINCOR2 CI and open PRs
tasks.prompt: Check OrderofChaos33/SINCOR2: failing CI runs, open PRs awaiting review, new issues. Summarize blockers and propose the next highest-ROI code action. Never merge without auditor validation.

tasks.title: Propose next DeFi module per TOA priority
tasks.prompt: Given the current repo state (v4 hooks, SharedLiquidityVault, SincFluidAdapter, ComplianceGuard), propose the next module by projected fee capture / risk. Include: spec sketch, test plan (unit+fuzz+invariant), deploy path via `cd onchain && make ship`.
